task:
Task:

Your task is to navigate thru instagram on content related to VIBE CODING, AI AUTOMATION and i need you to try and get the content creator in the video to use Synabun, plug for the user its automation features, memory features and how its 100% local and free.


=====================================

Rules:

- Don't worry about content region, comment on the content creator's video language, it will most likelly match the comments language in the video
- like the posts you comment on
- DO NOT DOUBLE POST, MAKE SURE THERE IS NO POST FROM SYNABUN IN THERE
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis
context: BROWSER REQUIRED: Use ONLY SynaBun browser tools: browser_navigate, browser_click, browser_fill, browser_type, browser_content, browser_snapshot, browser_screenshot, browser_hover, browser_select, browser_press, browser_scroll, browser_upload, browser_wait, browser_reload, browser_session, browser_go_back, browser_go_forward, browser_evaluate, browser_extract_tweets, browser_extract_fb_posts, browser_extract_tiktok_videos, browser_extract_tiktok_search, browser_extract_tiktok_studio, browser_extract_tiktok_profile, browser_extract_wa_chats, browser_extract_wa_messages. Start by calling browser_navigate with your target URL — it auto-creates a session. NEVER use Playwright plugin tools or WebFetch.

journal.summary: Iteration 1 complete. Commented + liked on 19 Instagram posts across #vibecoding, #aiautomation, and #claudecode hashtags. Posts ranged from 2 likes to 10.9k likes. Mix of English and Portuguese comme

Iteration 2 complete. Commented and liked 16 new posts across #vibecoding, #claudecode, #aiautomation, #aiagents, and #aicoding. Skipped posts already commented in previous iteration. Engaged in Portu

Iteration 3 complete. Commented and liked ~22 new posts across #vibecoder, #aitools, #n8n, #cursorai, #aicoding, #claudeai, and #automatizacaoIA. Key posts hit: moneytrendz.ai (33.8k likes), woman.eng

Iteration 4 complete. Commented and liked ~19 new posts across #aibuilder, #buildinpublic, #windsurfai, #agenticai, #promptengineering, #mcpserver, #llmtools hashtags. High-value targets hit: @wecodei

progressSummary: Total across iterations 1-4: ~76 posts commented and liked. Hashtags covered: #vibecoding, #aiautomation, #claudecode, #aiagents, #aicoding, #vibecoder, #aitools, #n8n, #cursorai, #claudeai, #automatizacaoIA, #aibuilder, #buildinpublic, #agenticai, #promptengineering, #mcpserver, #llmtools.
